let visible_messages = messages
  .iter()
  .filter(|item| item.enabled)
  .collect::<Vec<_>>();

let visible_workspaces = workspaces
  .iter()
  .filter(|item| item.enabled)
  .collect::<Vec<_>>();

let visible_drafts = drafts
  .iter()
  .filter(|item| item.enabled)
  .collect::<Vec<_>>();

let visible_permissions = permissions
  .iter()
  .filter(|item| item.enabled)
  .collect::<Vec<_>>();

let visible_bundles = bundles
  .iter()
  .filter(|item| item.enabled)
  .collect::<Vec<_>>();
